prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (58mm inducer, 82mm exducer) for the e-Skyactiv D 3.3L twin-turbo diesel (engine code: SH-VPTS), paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter by Milltek Sport for optimized exhaust flow and Euro 6d compliance

Full fuel system overhaul including Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump (3,000 bar) and Denso G4S 2,200cc/min fuel injectors, calibrated via a Cobb Accessport V3 with a custom e-Skyactiv D-specific tune by Viezu Technologies, targeting 380hp and 650Nm of torque with E85 compatibility

Suspension replacement with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CX-60-specific valving), featuring 30-way adjustable compression and rebound damping, paired with SuperPro polyurethane bushings (part no. SPF0116K) for the rear subframe and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, part no. BSR75XZ)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (CX-60-specific, part no. LB-CX60-WB) with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser, finished in Mazda Machine Gray with matte clear coat

Custom 22-inch BBS CI-R II forged wheels (9.5J ET35 front, 10.5J ET40 rear) in gloss black with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 R22 front, 295/30 R22 rear) for staggered fitment

Full interior rewrap in Alcantara (Autostyle AS-01) with red contrast stitching, including dashboard, door cards, and Recaro Sportster CS seats (CX-60-specific mounting brackets), paired with a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in) for structural rigidity
